meta_title: For Freelancers: project management to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Project Management to Scale Complex SaaS
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'basic app' plateau. Master project management for freelancers using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver high-end, scalable software faster.
content.answer_block: Stop building simple CRUD apps that hit a ceiling. By integrating structured project management with AI-driven development, you shift from a freelancer to a high-ticket architect. Use Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative logic, ensuring your builds are modular, maintainable, and client-ready from day one.
content.intro:
You’ve been here before: the initial excitement of a new project fades into a swamp of spaghetti code and scope creep. You’re shipping functional features, but you’re stuck in the 'basic app' loop, unable to scale or command premium rates because your development process lacks a structural backbone.

It’s time to stop coding like a hobbyist and start engineering like an architect. By combining professional project management methodologies with the raw speed of Antigravity and the contextual intelligence of Claude Code, you can transform your workflow from reactive chaos into a repeatable, high-output machine.

steps.title: Define Architecture with Antigravity
steps.description: Before writing code, map your database schema and API endpoints to prevent technical debt.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a scalable database schema for a multi-tenant project management SaaS. Include tables for users, tasks, projects, and milestones with proper foreign key constraints.

steps.title: Automate Feature Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate boilerplate code that adheres to clean architecture principles.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a modular Next.js feature module for task management. Include server actions, Zod validation, and UI components using Shadcn/UI.

steps.title: Implement Intelligent Contextual Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to bridge the gap between your requirements and the generated boilerplate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer function that handles task prioritization based on project deadlines and complexity scores.

steps.title: Systematic Error Handling
steps.description: Embed robust error boundaries and logging before shipping to production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the existing API routes to include centralized error handling and structured logging for monitoring.

steps.title: Automated Quality Assurance
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate unit tests for your core project management business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write Jest unit tests for the task priority service to ensure 90% coverage on edge cases.

pro_tips: Always store your project requirements in a markdown file in the root; Claude Code reads this as the 'source of truth' for every prompt.
Use Antigravity to generate 'dry-run' architecture diagrams before committing to a DB schema.
Keep your CLI history clean; use Claude Code’s session tagging to isolate different features in your workflow.
Refactor your UI components into a shared library immediately to ensure consistency across multiple client builds.
Treat your prompts as code; version control your prompt templates to maintain consistency across different projects.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current project's folder structure against the Clean Architecture pattern, then implement a single feature using the Claude Code workflow to feel the speed difference.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools and the methodology to stop being just another freelancer and start being a high-end AI Architect. Don't let another project slip into the 'basic app' trap. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
